description: AI personality definitions for bot players. Each personality has different decision weights that influence bot behavior. v1.1 adds 'manipulateur' (bluff-capable, belief-driven).

aggressive.description: Prefers attacking and risk-taking. High combat aggression, low defense priority.

prudent.description: Prefers defense and information gathering. Avoids combat, prioritizes card collection.

balanced.description: Adapts to game state with moderate approach. No strong preferences.

manipulateur.description: Master of deception. Occasionally attacks probable allies while hidden to poison everyone's deductions, then strikes with precision using belief-driven targeting.
